general.name: HBC AZR Root & Sub CA Cert
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist AZR Root & Sub CA Certificate</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>AZR-HBC-RootCA Base64.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>ED363283-37CC-48AB-97AD-49E54798F310</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.security.pkcs1</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Hudson's SubCA</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadCertificateFileName</key><string>AZR-HBC-SubCA01 Base64.cer</string><key>PayloadContent</key><data></data><key>AllowAllAppsAccess</key><true/><key>KeyIsExtractable</key><false/></dict></array></dict></plist>
